title: Die Macht der Drei: Ein Roman aus dem Jahre 1955
summaries: "Die Macht der Drei: Ein Roman aus dem Jahre 1955" by Hans Dominik is a science fiction novel published in 1922. Set in 1955, the story follows three men—a German, a Swede, and an Indian—who develop a powerful telenergetische device capable of seeing and affecting any point on Earth. As war threatens between Britain and the United States, this trio uses their extraordinary technology to intervene in global conflicts and prevent catastrophe, facing opposition from a hypnotic American adversary determined to seize their power.
